CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-18-2020 Continued To Apr-08-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Hearing On Plaintiffs Request For Court Judgment
Off Calendar Feb-25-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendants Emerchain Capital Advisory and Kieran Arasaratnam.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gerardo C. Sandoval. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

Paul T. Llewellyn, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Saswata Basu and for plaintiff OChain LLP.
Mr. Basu was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendants Emerchain Capital Advisory or Kieran Arasaratnam.
Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Contract and Fraud was filed on October 1, 2019.
Substitute service on defendants Emerchain Capital Advisory and Kieran Arasaratnam occurred on October 18, 2019 and was effectuated on October 28, 2019.
Defaults as to defendants Emerchain Capital Advisory and Kieran Arasaratnam were entered on December 3, 2019.
DOE defendants were dismissed on December 3, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiffs Saswata Basu and OChain LLP, and against the defaulted defendants Emerchain Capital Advisory and Kieran Arasaratnam, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $1,862,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $274,455.32.
Attorney Fees - $23,602.00.
Costs - $1,610.95.

Total - $2,161,668.27.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
